data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify uses a microservices architecture to allow for decentralized management and independent deployment of different services.
data.technical_spec: Services are written in various programming languages like Java, Python, and JavaScript.

data.title: Server-Side Rendering
data.description: Optimizes initial page load by rendering pages on the server before sending them to the client.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Node.js for server-side JavaScript execution.

data.title: API Gateway Pattern
data.description: Centralizes API management to streamline requests between clients and internal services.
data.technical_spec: Built on top of cloud services with RESTful APIs.

data.title: Data Streaming
data.description: Processes large quantities of real-time data from users and recommends music.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates technologies like Apache Kafka and Google BigQuery.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Hosts infrastructure on cloud platforms for scalability and reliability.
